General.Name: Podium Minerals Ltd
General.Description: Podium Minerals Limited operates as an exploration and resource development company in Australia. The company primarily explores for platinum, palladium, rhodium, and iridium; and nickel, copper, cobalt, and gold deposits. Its flagship project is the Parks Reef project located in the Mid-West region of Western Australia. The company was formerly known as Weld Range Metals Limited. The company was incorporated in 1986 and is headquartered in West Perth, Australia.
General.Address: 682 Murray Street, West Perth, WA, Australia, 6005
